subject: heap stream .get() method
truth: Stop calling .get() on heap streams and treating the result as raw bytes; it now returns a HeapItem object.
quote: BREAKING CHANGE: each heap stream's .get() returns a HeapItem instead of bytes

subject: GenericMethod metadata table
truth: Stop using the table name 'GenericMethod'; it has been renamed to 'MethodSpec' per ECMA 335.
quote: BREAKING CHANGE: rename GenericMethod mdtable to MethodSpec per ECMA 335

subject: minimum Python version
truth: Stop using Python versions older than 3.8; the library now requires Python 3.8 or newer.
quote: BREAKING CHANGE: Minimum required Python version is now 3.8

subject: resource type DateTime parsing
old: DateTime parsed without exposing Kind value
new: DateTime parsed into an object that exposes Kind value
truth: Stop assuming DateTime resource objects have no Kind attribute; they now expose a Kind value.
quote: BREAKING CHANGE: resource type DateTime is parsed into an object that exposes Kind value

from_fact: datetime parsed without exposing kind value
datetime parsed into an object that exposes kind value

subject: structure attributes
new: structure attributes no longer exist by default
truth: Stop relying on structure attributes existing by default; they no longer exist unless explicitly set.
quote: BREAKING CHANGE: structure attributes no longer exist by default

from_fact: structure attributes no longer exist by default

subject: objects' attributes
old: objects' attributes may not have existed
new: objects' attributes always exist, but may be None
truth: Objects' attributes always exist now but may be None, so code must handle None instead of catching AttributeError.
quote: BREAKING CHANGE: objects' attributes always exist, but may be None

from_fact: objects' attributes may not have existed
objects' attributes always exist, but may be none
